sub_mechanisms: M_1: K-motif vocabulary V_kashub 7 attention-head primitives canonical winding numbers w=(1,2,3,1,2,3,1)
M_2: spiral-rotation signature W_winding per-head winding-number topological invariant query-key correlation
M_3: per-region motif-specialization R_region layer×position pinned motif-head pair
M_4: density-grade ladder L_dec coarse-to-fine motif-density schedule low-layer central high-layer corner accent
M_5: topological-knot integrity tau_integrity per-head winding deviation detector + repair via projection onto nearest canonical winding

results.justification: TOHA topology divergence covers only M_5 (defect detection); no 7-motif vocabulary, no winding-number canonical assignment, no per-region pinning, no density ladder.
Hidden-Holes covers only M_5 (topological-aspects diagnostic); no K-motif vocabulary, no winding canonical, no region pinning, no density ladder.
Persistent-topology covers only M_5 (per-layer evolution); no 7-motif vocabulary, no winding-number canonical, no per-region pinning, no density-grade ladder.
CHAI covers partial M_1 (head clusters) and partial M_3; no winding-number, no density-grade ladder, no τ_integrity repair.
Attention-Head-Entropy covers only partial M_5 (entropy as diagnostic); no 7-motif vocabulary, no winding, no per-region, no density-ladder.
TDA-NLP survey covers only general M_5 paradigm; no specific 7-motif vocabulary, no canonical winding, no per-region pinning, no density ladder.
Attention-Heads-Review covers partial M_1; no winding-number canonical, no per-region pinning, no density-ladder, no τ_integrity repair.
Attention-Consistency covers partial M_5; no 7-motif vocabulary, no winding-number, no per-region pinning, no density-ladder.
